title: T-036 — Daily expiry cron job
prompt:
# T-036 — Daily expiry cron job

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §12.3 (FR-WH-022), V-WH-EXP-002/004.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Vercel Cron (or scheduler) runs daily at warehouse_settings.expiry_cron_schedule (default '0 2 * * *') auto-blocking expired use_by LPs and emitting alerts.

## Implementation contract
Route handler `apps/web/app/api/cron/warehouse/expiry-check/route.ts`. Per LP where `expiry_date < CURRENT_DATE AND status IN ('available','reserved') AND qa_status NOT IN ('QUARANTINED','FAILED')`:
- shelf_life_mode='use_by' → set status='blocked', insert lp_state_history, emit lp.expired (T-047 wiring).
- shelf_life_mode='best_before' → keep status, dashboard alert flag.
Log cron_jobs row {job_name, started_at, finished_at, lps_blocked, lps_warned}. Email manager via 02-SETTINGS EmailConfig.
`vercel.json` adds the cron schedule.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/cron/warehouse/expiry-check/route.ts [create]
- vercel.json [modify]
- apps/web/app/api/cron/warehouse/expiry-check/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given LPs with expiry < today and shelf_life_mode='use_by', when cron runs, then status='blocked' and lp_state_history records auto-block.
2. Given LPs with shelf_life_mode='best_before' and expired, when cron runs, then status remains unchanged but a warning flag/log is captured.
3. Given cron completes, when cron_jobs is queried, then a row exists with started_at/finished_at/lps_blocked/lps_warned counts.

## Test strategy
- RED: route.test.ts seeds two expired LPs, invokes the cron handler, asserts state and cron_jobs row.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test expiry-check`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-block best_before LPs.
- Do not skip cron_jobs row (SLO alert depends on it).
- Do not modify expiry_date (LP retention principle).

pipeline_inputs.description: Daily cron auto-blocking use_by-expired LPs and warning best_before; cron_jobs audit row.
pipeline_inputs.details: Vercel Cron schedule from warehouse_settings; email notification via 02-SETTINGS EmailConfig; never modify expiry_date.
acceptance_criteria: Given expired use_by LPs, when cron runs, then status='blocked' and lp_state_history records auto-block
Given expired best_before LPs, when cron runs, then status remains unchanged and warning flag is captured
Given cron completes, when cron_jobs is queried, then row exists with started_at/finished_at/lps_blocked/lps_warned
test_strategy: RED: route.test.ts seeds expired LPs and invokes the handler
